source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, tabular numbers, dense tables, and accessible garden-data dashboards.
layout: Practical 8px grids, crisp 8px radii, leaf-green data panels, magenta action emphasis, yellow attention states, lime secondary surfaces, ribbed-stem texture strips, and low garden-workspace shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent rainbow chard motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #0000ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG with soft matte and despill.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a Rainbow Chard botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact kitchen-garden rainbow chard bundle with overlapping glossy dark green leaves and thick ribbed stems in vivid magenta, golden yellow, lime green, and pale leaf-green. Botanical accuracy for Swiss chard: broad crinkled leaves, prominent colored midribs, crisp edible stems, fresh garden harvest character, opaque solid plant surfaces, high detail, natural leaf veins, clean edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full leaves and visible stems without cropping. Upright slight fan arrangement, clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #0000ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #0000ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no soil, no basket, no cutting board, no kitchen tools, no water droplets, no hand, no text, no watermark, no extra plant species, no flowers, no transparent or translucent leaf edges.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Rainbow Chard light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Rainbow Chard", derived from the visible transparent rainbow chard cutout in this conversation. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible accessible data system for kitchen-garden operations.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, 3840x2160 4K-class composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rainbow Chard, Rainbow Chard, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language only from the motif: glossy dark chard leaves, deep leaf shadow green, fresh garden green, ribbed magenta stems, bright yellow stem, pale lime stem, leaf-vein highlights, cream cut-stem neutrals, and clean kitchen-garden whites. Use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals from those sources.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, accessible kitchen-garden data dashboard metric cards, harvest chart, inventory table, progress states, empty/loading/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius token, shadow tokens, simple lucide-style icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px radii, light leaf-mist background, white and pale-lime panels, deep leaf-green text, magenta primary actions, yellow warning highlights, lime secondary surfaces, dark leaf borders and focus rings, subtle ribbed-stem and crinkled-leaf texture. Accessible contrast, practical data-system mood, not decorative.
Composition: organize as a polished design-system poster with large readable headings and practical UI examples, not a marketing landing page.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradient theme, no beige-only palette, no extra vegetables, no garden photo background, no stock photos, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Rainbow Chard".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Rainbow Chard dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Rainbow Chard". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible rainbow chard cutout.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, 3840x2160 4K-class composition, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Rainbow Chard, Rainbow Chard, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve the system language from the light board: glossy dark chard leaves, deep leaf shadow green, fresh garden green, ribbed magenta stems, bright yellow stem, pale lime stem, leaf-vein highlights, cream cut-stem neutrals, kitchen-garden data dashboard, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep all text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, accessible kitchen-garden data dashboard metric cards, harvest chart, inventory table, progress states, empty/loading/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius token, shadow tokens, simple lucide-style icons.
Visual details: dark background from deepest leaf-shadow greens, readable pale stem-cream and leaf-highlight text, magenta primary actions, yellow warning and attention states, lime secondary surfaces, chard-green success states, muted dark leaf panels, subtle ribbed-stem and crinkled-leaf texture overlays, restrained accessible contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Composition: organize as a polished dark design-system poster with large readable headings and practical UI examples, not a marketing landing page.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradient theme, no extra vegetables, no garden photo background, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Rainbow Chard".
